2360870.name: Rhythm Realm
2360870.description:
Enter Euteria—otherwise known as the "RHYTHM REALM"

In this world:

Pigs talk,

Olives walk,

And the muses watch over everything.

Play as Jim Gino, a mute boy with a special sword and the power to sense rhythm in his enemies' movements.

In Rhythm Realm, You will Experience...

  • Battles in the form of a rhythm minigame, all accompanied by an original soundtrack

  • A 15-20 hour adventure with many sidequests, hidden areas, and rabbit holes to explore

  • A colorful world with both familiar and bizarre environments. Go from humble farmlands to the top of a leaning tower, monster-infested lakes, and interdimensional doors

  • Zany characters and dialogue: talking animals, tomatoes, rocks--you name it!

  • Handy items from a shady salesman and powerful blessings from the Muses to aid players who lack rhythm in combat

  • Puzzles ranging from small brain to slightly-larger than average brain

  • Spaghetti and meatballs

  • Pet rock

  • An Italian Santa Claus

WARNING! Rhythm Realm Does NOT Contain

  • Level grinding

  • Escort quests

  • Excessive backtracking

  • Microtransactions

Warning: Game contains imagery that may be harmful to players with photosensitive epilepsy.
2360870.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
